layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-6 and p-8 for standard containers.
layout.admin_dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 (Control Room Pattern). Dense layout, full height utilization.
layout.student_dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 (Bento Grid Pattern). Asymmetrical spans (col-span-4, col-span-8) for visual tension.
layout.borders: Technical Look: 1px solid border-gray-200. No heavy or muddy shadows. Keep it flat and crisp.
layout.radius: rounded-md for general elements, rounded-sm for small inputs.

components.buttons: Solid primary background (#5B21B6) with white text. Hover state must explicitly lighten or darken (#4C1D95).
components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-gray-200), no drop shadow by default.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components. Remove default SaaS look. Generous padding, crisp borders. Focus states must use high-contrast ring-purple-600.
components.tables: Shadcn UI. Dense data presentation. Use IBM Plex Sans for tabular data.
components.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) if sticky, or pure flat white with 1px border-b if static.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items and table rows.

login_hero.description: Student working on laptop. Use for login page background.

abstract_background.description: Abstract purple geometric pattern. Use for empty states, sidebars, or decorative banners.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure deep purple meets APCA standards against white.
accessibility.test_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='student-join-class-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: E1 Design Principle: Color is function. 95% of UI must be monochrome (White/Grays). Use the Deep Purple (#5B21B6) ONLY to guide action (Buttons, Active states, Key Metrics).
Do not use generic purple-to-blue gradients. Stick to solid, high-contrast colors.
Implement the 3 Role-Based Dashboards: Admin (Control Room Grid), Teacher (List/Schedule Focus), Student (Bento Grid).
Admin requirement: Enforce mandatory fields for Student Enrollment (Name, Parent Name, Contact, Gmail ID).
Student requirement: Implement the class logic precisely. Disable 'Join Class' if remaining classes are 0.
Use Shadcn UI extensively for complex interactions (Tables, Modals, Forms) but style them to match the Swiss High-Contrast aesthetic.
Add data-testid to everything. Do not forget.
